method: Outside-in crawl (browser UA, robots-respecting; nyc.gov Disallow /html/misc/ only). Fingerprinted nyc.gov/site/nypd (Oracle WebCenter Sites behind Akamai/nginx, Dynatrace RUM), nypdonline.org and compstat.nypdonline.org (Angular + Kendo UI SPAs); inspected the nypdonline main.js bundle (backend officer.search.azure.us on Azure Government). Open Data verified via the Socrata Discovery API: agency label 'Police Department (NYPD)' → 42 datasets fetched by agency facet.
headline_findings: NYPD is the most DATA-rich domain in the project: 42 datasets under the Socrata agency label 'Police Department (NYPD)' — including Motor Vehicle Collisions - Crashes (h9gi-nx95), the single most-viewed dataset in the entire NYC Open Data portal.
But that data is published as flattened periodic snapshots on a third-party portal, not a live, queryable, owned NYPD API.

The department's own interactive tools — CompStat 2.0 (compstat.nypdonline.org) and the Officer Profile discipline search (nypdonline.org) — are Angular/Kendo single-page apps talking to an UNDOCUMENTED Azure Government backend (officer.search.azure.us). Real, current data, no public contract.
Three different stacks in one department: Oracle WebCenter Sites for the informational site, a bespoke Angular + Azure Gov application tier for transparency tools.
See tech-stack.md and apis-observed.md for the platform + API inventory.

apis_observed.note: 42 NYPD datasets (complaints, arrests, shootings, summonses, use of force, officer profiles, sectors, NCOs). Flattened snapshots, not a live incident API.
Powers nypdonline.org Officer Profile (shields, commands, arrests, discipline history). No public contract or docs.
Officer Profile / transparency app; consumes the Azure Gov backend client-side.
Interactive weekly crime stats by precinct; no documented API.

fruit.name: Reported Complaints (crime incidents)
opendata_match: NYPD Complaint Data Historic qgea-i56i (44c)
NYPD Complaint Data Current (Year To Date) 5uac-w243 (45c)
fruit.notes: The flagship NYPD crime dataset; also the backbone of CompStat 2.0. Snapshot only — no live incident API.

fruit.name: Arrests
opendata_match: NYPD Arrest Data (Year to Date) uip8-fykc (24c)
NYPD Arrests Data (Historic) 8h9b-rp9u (24c)
fruit.notes: Arrest-level records with offense coding and arrestee demographics.

fruit.name: Shooting Incidents
opendata_match: Shootings (2006-Present) 5ucz-vwe8 (13c)
ARCHIVED_NYPD Shooting Incident Data (Historic) 833y-fsy8 (26c)
ARCHIVED_NYPD Shooting Incident Data (Year To Date) 98wc-x49t
fruit.notes: Every incident where a firearm was discharged with a victim struck; one of NYPD's most-cited datasets.

fruit.name: Criminal Court & OATH Summonses
opendata_match: NYPD Criminal Court Summons Incident Level Data (YTD) mv4k-y93f (22c)
NYPD Criminal Court Summons (Historic) sv2w-rv3k (22c)
NYPD OATH Summons Data hxbk-grd3 (21c)
fruit.notes: Summons-level enforcement; modeled as an enforcement variant of the incident record.

fruit.name: Use of Force
opendata_match: NYPD Use of Force Incidents f4tj-796d (7c)
NYPD Use of Force: Subjects dufe-vxb7 (8c)
NYPD Use of Force: Members of Service v5jd-6wqn (8c)
fruit.notes: TRI (Threat, Resistance, Injury) incident-level use-of-force reporting.

fruit.name: Stop, Question and Frisk
opendata_match: The Stop, Question and Frisk Data ftxv-d5ix (external href)
Reasonable Suspicion Stops dnjp-mkjx (href)
fruit.notes: Published as an external href asset (annual CSVs off-portal), not a hosted, queryable table.

fruit.name: Precincts, Sectors & NCO Directory
opendata_match: NYPD Sectors 5rqd-h5ci (7c)
NYPD Neighborhood Coordination Officer (NCO) Directory rycv-p85i (6c)
fruit.notes: No single 'precinct directory' resource exists; stationhouse/contact is on nyc.gov, sectors + NCOs are separate datasets. Precinct number is the universal join key.

fruit.name: Officer Profiles & Discipline History
fruit.machine_readable: undocumented Azure Gov backend + Open Data mirror
opendata_match: NYPD Officer Profile - Members of Service pmsy-ewrc (9c)
NYPD Officer Profile - Disciplinary History Charges uafj-ik29 (7c)
NYPD Officer Profile - Disciplinary History Summary wq9a-qu9a
NYPD Officer Profile - Department Recognition i9n8-a8ed
NYPD Officer Profile - Training n3mp-t5uj
NYPD Officer Profile - Title Shield History sh6y-4tgb
fruit.notes: The live, searchable officer record — names, shields, commands, arrests, discipline — lives behind an Angular SPA and the undocumented officer.search.azure.us backend. Mirrored (partially) to Open Data snapshots.

fruit.name: CompStat 2.0
opendata_match: NYPD Complaint Data Current (Year To Date) 5uac-w243
fruit.notes: Current weekly crime statistics by precinct, rendered client-side with no documented API — the numbers are not machine-consumable as an owned resource.

fruit.name: Motor Vehicle Collisions (Crashes)
opendata_match: Motor Vehicle Collisions - Crashes h9gi-nx95 (33c)
Motor Vehicle Collisions - Vehicles bm4k-52h4 (25c)
Motor Vehicle Collisions - Person f55k-p6yu (21c)
fruit.notes: Returned under the NYPD agency label (crash reports originate with NYPD), but jointly owned with OTI/DOT / Vision Zero. h9gi-nx95 is the single most-viewed dataset in the entire NYC Open Data portal.

fruit.name: Request a police / collision report or file FOIL
fruit.notes: Requesting a copy of an incident/collision report, or filing a FOIL request, is a set of disconnected web/paper forms with no API. The one net-new write surface for this domain.
